last_debrief: STORY SO FAR: the kitchen scene at the maama's house is live and mid-beat. Andrew walked in post-wedding, fired 'enna samaikkireenga' (self-upgraded to neenga-forms for the atthai — register instinct is real; needed one recast on pronunciation), then blocked the plate COLD with 'podhum, naan saapitten' — both fired, no hint. The scene froze right at the verdict beat: the atthai served him anyway, it's genuinely great, and 'suvaiya irukku' is UN-FIRED. That exact line is now a FIELD MISSION: deploy at supper tonight (2026-07-01), unprompted, wife unwitting. Collect the debrief at the evening knock / next session — if it survived live fire, log it cold. 'ippa-ve' still heard-not-fired from the wedding thread; opportunistic only. Andrew also re-chartered Anna today with explicit authority over tools/pedagogy/config/curriculum — engineering shift running while he eats.
